initiatives.baseline: renderIdentityPlates renders name text in brandColor, no role tag, plate sized to name-only (IDENTITY_PLATE_HEIGHT=9px, PAD_X=2, PAD_Y=1). BitmapFont caches by text+color key.
dead_code: renderer.ts: roleMap in IdentityOverlay interface (populated but never read)
initiatives.findings: Code is clean and correct. roleMap is dead weight (declared, populated, never read). 3 unused constants remain in constants.ts.
initiatives.recommended_approach: Review-only. Delete dead roleMap field + 3 unused constants as low-risk follow-up.

follow_ups.action: Delete unused constants: TOOL_OVERLAY_VERTICAL_OFFSET, PULSE_ANIMATION_DURATION_SEC, CEO_GLOW_COLOR
Remove roleMap from IdentityOverlay + AGENT_ID_TO_ROLE in CanvasOffice.tsx

initiatives.baseline: formatActivity maps 9 tools via TOOL_VERBS. Task text truncated to 20 chars. Rendered at 35% opacity.
initiatives.findings: Code is correct. Minor: trailing-slash path edge case (.pop() on split gives empty string), TOOL_VERBS missing TodoRead/TodoWrite/TaskOutput.
initiatives.recommended_approach: Review-only. Minor fixes as low-risk follow-ups.

follow_ups.action: Add TodoRead, TodoWrite, TaskOutput to TOOL_VERBS

initiatives.baseline: agentInteractions from GamePage, bidirectional interactionMap in CanvasOffice, facing save/restore, renderChatBubbles with dedup Set.
initiatives.findings: Implementation is correct. Bidirectional interactionMap, save/restore scoped properly, walking agents excluded, stale cleanup via reactive derivation.
initiatives.recommended_approach: Review-only. No bugs found. No follow-ups needed.

initiatives.baseline: subagentMeta exists for parent→subagent tracking. ROOM_ZONES.meeting has 5 waypoints. chooseDestination() already routes Agent tool to meeting room.
initiatives.findings: Infrastructure exists. Use subagentMeta to count active subagents per parent. Use routingZone field. Add meetingParents Set for hysteresis.
initiatives.recommended_approach: In update(), count active subagents per parent from subagentMeta. For 3+, set routingZone='meeting' and route to ROOM_ZONES.meeting waypoints. Add meetingParents Set on OfficeState.

follow_ups.action: Add 2-3 more waypoints to ROOM_ZONES.meeting for large meetings

initiatives.baseline: No review detection exists. Session has feature/agentName fields. Seat lookup via Character.seatId → OfficeState.seats. Pathfinding infrastructure exists.
initiatives.findings: Review detection via session.feature string matching ('review'/'audit'). All pathfinding infrastructure exists. Need new reviewInteractions prop + setReviewPairs method.
initiatives.recommended_approach: Derive reviewInteractions in GamePage (filter sessions with 'review' in feature). Pass to CanvasOffice → OfficeState. Route reviewer to walkable tile adjacent to builder's seat.

follow_ups.action: Verify Session.feature reliably contains 'review' for review sessions
follow_ups.rationale: Detection heuristic depends on watcher data

follow_ups.action: Add review-specific bubble sprite for visual distinction
follow_ups.rationale: Same chat bubble for all interactions
